title: Stock futures are little changed after the S&P 500 closes at another record: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite both reached new all-time highs and closing records on Tuesday, with stock futures showing minimal movement the following day. The market rally reflects sustained investor confidence despite economic uncertainties.
content: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rose to fresh intraday and closing records on Tuesday.

zh.title: 标普500再创新纪录后股指期货基本持平：实时更新
zh.summary: 周二标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数均创下历史新高，随后股指期货涨幅有限。市场上扬反映出投资者信心持久，尽管经济存在不确定性。

title: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
summary: UK advertising regulators have banned Instagram betting advertisements featuring high-profile footballers Kane and Haaland due to their strong appeal to minors. The move reflects growing scrutiny of gambling marketing tactics targeting vulnerable young audiences.
content: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.

zh.title: Instagram凯恩和哈兰德博彩广告遭禁
zh.summary: 英国广告监管机构禁止了Instagram上刊登含有足球明星凯恩和哈兰德的博彩广告，因为这些广告对未成年人具有强大吸引力。此举反映了外界对针对弱势青少年群体的博彩营销策略日益增长的审视。

title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Technology stocks, particularly Micron Technology, led a rally that pushed both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite to new all-time highs on Tuesday. The tech sector momentum signals investor optimism heading into the next trading session.
content: A rally in the tech sector — led by Micron Technology — lifted the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite to fresh all-time highs and closing records Tuesday.

zh.title: 周三大股票故事：下个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 科技股，特别是美光科技，领导了一场涨势，将标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数都推至周二的历史新高。科技板块的势头表明投资者对下一个交易时段持乐观态度。

title: Iran war impact to hit household energy bills for the first time
summary: Geopolitical tensions with Iran are expected to increase household energy costs by approximately £200 annually for typical British consumers, marking the first direct impact of regional conflict on residential utility bills. Rising energy prices reflect global market uncertainties amid Middle East tensions.
content: A household using a typical amount of gas and electricity is forecast to pay about £200 more a year.

zh.title: 伊朗战争影响首次冲击家庭能源账单
zh.summary: 与伊朗的地缘政治紧张局势预计将使典型英国消费者的家庭能源成本每年增加约200英镑，标志着区域冲突对住宅公用事业账单的首次直接影响。能源价格上升反映了中东紧张局势中的全球市场不确定性。

title: Federal judge had sex in chambers with high-ranking police officer, panel says
summary: A federal judge has engaged in a sexual relationship with a high-ranking police officer within judicial chambers, according to a disciplinary review panel. The unnamed judge's identity and specific location remain confidential as the panel investigates the conduct breach.
content: The judge sits in a district court in either Alabama, Georgia or Florida, but their name is being kept secret by a disciplinary panel.

zh.title: 联邦法官在法庭内与高级警官发生性关系，委员会称
zh.summary: 根据纪律审查委员会的说法，一名联邦法官在司法法庭内与一名高级警官有过性关系。这位未透露姓名的法官身份和具体地点在委员会调查这一行为违规期间保持机密。

title: SpaceX-Tesla merger chatter reignites as Musk pushes rocket company towards Nasdaq
summary: Speculation about a potential SpaceX-Tesla merger has resurfaced as SpaceX prepares for a Nasdaq listing next month, with sources close to Elon Musk discussing a possible combination. Such a merger would reshape both companies' market positions and Musk's corporate portfolio.
content: With SpaceX headed for the public markets next month, industry experts and people close to Elon Musk are speculating about a potential tie-up with Tesla.

zh.title: 马斯克力推SpaceX纳斯达克上市之际，SpaceX-Tesla合并传言再现
zh.summary: 随着SpaceX准备下月在纳斯达克上市，关于潜在SpaceX-Tesla合并的传言重新浮出水面，与埃隆·马斯克有关的人士在讨论可能的合并方案。这样的合并将重塑两家公司的市场地位和马斯克的企业投资组合。

title: ‘The timing couldn’t have been better’ for investors in MSGS as the Knicks make the NBA Finals
summary: MSG Sports stock has surged 39% year-to-date and 88% over the past year, with shares accelerating further following the New York Knicks' advancement to the NBA Finals. The company benefits from increased investor enthusiasm tied to the basketball team's playoff success.
content: Shares of MSG Sports have climbed 39% this year and are up 88% over the last 12 months. And that was before the Knicks made it to the NBA Finals.

zh.title: 尼克斯进入NBA总决赛，MSGS投资者迎来"完美时机"
zh.summary: MSG Sports股票年初至今上涨39%，过去一年上涨88%。在纽约尼克斯队挺进NBA总决赛后，股价进一步加速上升。该公司得益于篮球队季后赛成功所带来的投资者热情高涨。

title: Better WiFi for hundreds of trains under government plans
summary: The UK government plans to improve WiFi connectivity on hundreds of trains, a move welcomed by campaigners seeking better passenger services. However, railway advocates note that passengers remain primarily concerned about ticket prices and schedule reliability.
content: Campaigners welcome the move but say passengers are mostly worried about train fares and delays.

zh.title: 英国政府计划为数百列火车改善WiFi服务
zh.summary: 英国政府计划改善数百列火车的WiFi连接，这一举措得到了主张改善乘客服务倡导人士的欢迎。但铁路倡导者指出，乘客最关心的仍然是车票价格和列车时间表的可靠性。

title: How a stock market ‘melt-up’ could carry the S&P 500 to 8,000 or beyond
summary: Market analysts suggest a potential "melt-up" scenario could propel the S&P 500 toward or beyond 8,000 points as the U.S. stock market experiences exceptional gains this summer. The rally reflects sustained investor momentum and economic optimism despite various macro uncertainties.
content: The hottest thing in the U.S. this summer isn’t the weather — it’s the rip-roaring stock market.

zh.title: 股市'融化式上升'如何可能将标普500指数推向8000点或更高
zh.summary: 市场分析师预示,在美国股市今夏实现非凡涨幅之际,一个潜在的'融化式上升'情景可能将标普500指数推向或超越8000点。这次上涨反映了持续的投资者动力和经济乐观,尽管存在各种宏观不确定性。

title: SpaceX just won a $2 billion contract to make satellites for the Space Force
summary: The U.S. Space Force has awarded SpaceX a $2 billion satellite manufacturing contract, strengthening the company's relationship with its largest government customer. The deal underscores SpaceX's dominant position in commercial space operations supporting national defense.
content: The U.S. Space Force on Tuesday awarded SpaceX a new, pricy satellite contract, further tying the company to its biggest customer.

zh.title: SpaceX刚刚赢得20亿美元合同为太空军制造卫星
zh.summary: 美国太空军已向SpaceX授予20亿美元的卫星制造合同,加强了该公司与其最大政府客户的关系。这笔交易突出了SpaceX在支持国防的商业太空运营中的主导地位。

title: Gen Z demands bigger bargains — driving gains for discount retailers like Walmart and Ross
summary: Generation Z consumers are gravitating toward discount retailers like Walmart and Ross as inflationary pressures increase the cost of goods across the economy. This consumer shift toward budget-friendly options is driving significant growth for value-oriented retailers.
content: As seemingly everything gets more expensive, younger consumers are increasingly driving growth for the nation’s biggest discount retailers.

zh.title: Z世代要求更大折扣——推动沃尔玛和Ross等折扣零售商增长
zh.summary: 随着通胀压力推高经济中商品成本,Z世代消费者正转向沃尔玛和Ross等折扣零售商。这一消费者向低价选项的转变正在推动面向价值的零售商实现显著增长。

title: Trump officials split over Pope Leo’s AI warning as Vatican feud enters new front
summary: Pope Leo XIV has issued warnings about AI, creating a rift within Trump's administration between those supporting AI regulation and those opposing restrictions. The disagreement reflects competing interests with Catholic voters and the tech industry. This matters as it demonstrates how AI governance has become a flashpoint in domestic politics and international relations.
content: Pope Leo XIV’s AI warning shows split among Trump officials as the White House resists new guardrails, upping stakes with Catholic voters and Silicon Valley allies.

zh.title: 特朗普官员在教宗关于AI的警告上意见分歧，梵蒂冈争执进入新前线
zh.summary: 教宗利奥十四世发布了关于AI的警告，在特朗普政府内部造成分歧，支持AI监管的官员与反对限制的官员产生了裂痕。这种分歧反映了与天主教选民和科技产业之间的利益竞争。这很重要，因为它表明AI治理如何成为国内政治和国际关系中的热点。

title: The bond market has been rocked by a violent selloff. Here’s how to play it.
summary: Bond markets are experiencing sharp declines driven by geopolitical uncertainty surrounding Iran and persistent inflation concerns. The market is also recalibrating expectations for Federal Reserve policy under new chair Kevin Warsh. This matters as bonds are traditionally seen as safe-haven assets, so turmoil here signals broader economic anxiety.
content: The bond market is tied up in knots about the Iran war and inflation, as well as what the Federal Reserve under new chair Kevin Warsh might do about it.

zh.title: 债券市场遭遇猛烈抛售 如何应对
zh.summary: 债券市场因伊朗地缘政治不确定性和持续通胀担忧而出现大幅下跌。市场正在重新调整对新美联储主席凯文·沃什货币政策的预期。这很重要，因为债券传统上被视为避险资产，所以市场混乱表明了更广泛的经济焦虑。

title: Why double-digit earnings growth won’t stop the next bear market
summary: Strong S&P 500 earnings growth historically precedes market downturns rather than sustained bull markets, suggesting stocks may be approaching dangerous territory. Historical patterns indicate that peak profit growth often coincides with the end of bull markets. This matters as it challenges the assumption that strong earnings automatically justify high valuations.
content: Spiking S&P 500 profits often signal the final innings of a bull market. History says stocks are on thin ice.

zh.title: 为什么两位数盈利增长无法阻止下一次熊市
zh.summary: 历史上强劲的标普500盈利增长往往先于市场下跌而非持续牛市，这表明股票可能正在接近危险区域。历史模式表明利润增长峰值往往与牛市结束相吻合。这很重要，因为它挑战了强劲盈利自动证明高估值合理的假设。

title: Apple's surge to record highs faces a major test next month. What it must do to pass
summary: Apple's stock has surged to record highs ahead of WWDC on June 8, where the company must demonstrate compelling AI features to justify valuations. The developer conference will be crucial for managing investor expectations. This matters as Apple's AI strategy is viewed as essential to sustaining its momentum in the AI-driven market.
content: The iPhone maker's WWDC kicks off on June 8, offering Apple another chance to impress Wall Street on AI.

zh.title: 苹果创纪录新高面临下月重大考验 必须做什么才能通过
zh.summary: 苹果股票在6月8日WWDC大会前创下历史新高，该公司必须展示引人注目的AI功能来证明其估值合理。这次开发者大会对于管理投资者预期至关重要。这很重要，因为苹果的AI战略被认为是维持其在AI驱动市场中动力的关键。

title: Judges block Alabama redistricting maps that would dilute Black vote in midterms
summary: A federal three-judge panel ruled that Alabama's 2023 congressional district maps intentionally discriminated against Black voters. The decision strikes down maps that would have diluted Black voting power in midterm elections. The ruling reinforces voting rights protections in contested redistricting battles.
content: A three-judge panel found that the 2023 congressional district maps adopted by Alabama intentionally discriminated against Black voters.

zh.title: 法官阻止阿拉巴马州重划选区地图 削弱黑人在中期选举中的投票权
zh.summary: 联邦三法官小组裁定阿拉巴马州2023年国会选区地图故意歧视黑人选民。该决定推翻了本会削弱黑人在中期选举中投票权的地图。该裁决加强了在有争议的重划选区斗争中的投票权保护。

title: Americans feel worse than ever, a consumer survey shows. The White House says that’s bunk. Who’s right?
summary: A long-running consumer survey indicates Americans feel worse than ever about their financial well-being, contradicting the Trump administration's economic optimism. The disparity highlights tensions between official assessments and actual consumer sentiment on economic conditions. The disagreement raises questions about which metric better reflects underlying economic health.
content: Are Americans really feeling worse than ever about their financial well-being? A long-running survey of consumers suggests the answer is yes, drawing a sharp rebuke President Trump’s right-hand man on the economy.

zh.title: 消费者调查显示美国人感觉比以往任何时候都糟糕，白宫说这是胡说八道。谁是对的？
zh.summary: 长期运行的消费者调查表明美国人对其财务状况的感受比以往任何时候都糟糕，这与特朗普政府的经济乐观态度相矛盾。这种差异突显了官方评估与实际消费者经济状况情绪之间的紧张关系。这一分歧引发了人们对哪种指标能更好地反映潜在经济健康状况的质疑。

title: Markets suggest stocks are on solid ground and crude oil could be in for a decline, Todd Gordon says
summary: Market indicators like the VIX suggest equities remain on solid footing with potential for crude oil prices to decline significantly if geopolitical tensions ease. Crude could fall toward $70-80 per barrel under favorable conditions, according to market analysis. The outlook reflects investor optimism about equity stability amid global uncertainties.
content: The VIX is saying that equities are in good shape and, if a resolution of the war is near, crude oil may plummet into the $80s, and maybe $70s, per barrel.

zh.title: 托德·戈登表示市场表明股票基础稳固，原油可能面临下跌
zh.summary: VIX等市场指标表明股票基础保持稳固，如果地缘政治紧张局势缓和，原油价格可能大幅下跌。根据市场分析，在有利条件下，原油可能跌至每桶70-80美元。这一前景反映了投资者对全球不确定性中股票稳定性的乐观态度。

title: Cornyn and Paxton go head-to-head in Texas Republican Senate primary after Trump endorsement
summary: President Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Senator John Cornyn in a closely watched Republican primary. The endorsement intensifies a primary battle between two prominent Texas Republicans. The race demonstrates Trump's continued influence in GOP contests and factional tensions within the party.
content: President Donald Trump last week endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn.

zh.title: 特朗普背书后，科尼恩和派克斯顿在德州共和党参议院初选中对阵
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在备受关注的共和党初选中背书了德州总检察长肯·派克斯顿，而不是现任参议员约翰·科尼恩。这一背书加剧了两位德州知名共和党人之间的初选之战。这场竞选展示了特朗普在共和党竞争中的持续影响力以及党内的派系紧张局势。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Micron Technology, AutoZone, Qualcomm, Oklo & more
summary: Multiple companies including Micron Technology, AutoZone, Qualcomm, and Oklo posted significant stock movements during midday trading. The broad volatility reflects market reactions to company-specific and sector developments. The activity highlights ongoing market dynamics across technology and retail sectors.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 中午股市大幅波动：美光科技、AutoZone、高通、Oklo等
zh.summary: 包括美光科技、AutoZone、高通和Oklo在内的多家公司在中午交易时段股价出现大幅波动。广泛的波动性反映了市场对公司特定和行业发展的反应。这些活动突显了整个科技和零售行业持续的市场动态。

title: AutoZone stock on pace for worst trading day since March 2020, despite retailer beating Wall Street estimates
summary: AutoZone shares plummeted to worst-day levels since March 2020 despite beating earnings estimates, signaling investor concerns about future growth. Worries about international expansion, margin pressure, inflation, and supply chain disruptions outweighed the positive earnings beat. The sharp decline shows how forward-looking concerns can overwhelm strong current results.
content: Concerns included international growth, margin compression as well as pressures from inflation, energy costs and potential supply chain disruptions.

zh.title: AutoZone股票创下2020年3月以来最差交易日，尽管零售商超越华尔街预期
zh.summary: 尽管超过盈利预期，AutoZone股票仍下跌至2020年3月以来的最差水平，表明投资者对未来增长的担忧。国际扩张、利润压力、通货膨胀和供应链中断的担忧抵消了积极的盈利超预期。这种急剧下降表明前瞻性担忧如何能够压倒强劲的当前业绩。

title: Democratic AGs snub Vance's anti-fraud roundtable at White House after late invite
summary: Democratic Attorneys General declined Vice President JD Vance's invitation to a White House roundtable on reducing fraud in federally funded state programs. The snub reflects partisan tensions over the Trump administration's anti-fraud initiative. The absence of Democratic AGs limits input from a key stakeholder group on federal-state program integrity.
content: Vice President JD Vance is leading an initiative by the Trump administration to reduce fraud in federally funded programs that are administered by states.

zh.title: 民主党司法部长拒绝万斯白宫反欺诈圆桌会议邀请
zh.summary: 民主党司法部长拒绝了副总统JD万斯关于在白宫举办的减少联邦资助州项目欺诈圆桌会议的邀请。这一拒绝反映了对特朗普政府反欺诈倡议的党派紧张关系。民主党司法部长的缺席限制了关键利益相关者对联邦-州项目完整性的意见。

title: Why oil prices matter so much to DuPont, and the big earnings report to watch tonight
summary: Oil price movements significantly impact DuPont's operations and profitability as a major industrial manufacturer. DuPont's earnings report offers insight into how energy costs influence large industrial sector performance. The announcement is part of daily market analysis tracking critical business developments.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 油价为什么对杜邦如此重要，以及今晚要关注的大型财报
zh.summary: 油价波动对杜邦作为主要工业制造商的运营和盈利能力产生重大影响。杜邦的财报提供了关于能源成本如何影响大型工业部门表现的见解。这一公告是追踪关键业务发展的日常市场分析的一部分。

title: Ferrari shares slump 6% after new electric vehicle is bashed online. Why Wall Street says buy the dip
summary: Ferrari's stock fell 6% following negative online reception of its first all-electric vehicle, called Luce, despite Wall Street's positive outlook. Analysts viewed the selloff as an overreaction to social media criticism and recommended buying the dip. The contrast highlights differing perspectives between retail investors and professional analysts on Ferrari's EV strategy.
content: The Italian luxury car maker unveiled its first all-electric vehicle, called Luce. Online critics were unimpressed.

zh.title: 新电动汽车遭网络吐槽后法拉利股价下跌6% 华尔街为何建议低位买入
zh.summary: 法拉利首款全电动汽车Luce遭负面网络评论后股价下跌6%，尽管华尔街前景看好。分析师认为此次股价下跌是对社交媒体批评的过度反应，并建议低位买入。这反映了散户投资者和专业分析师对法拉利电动汽车战略的不同看法。

title: Your credit card could help cut the cost of your summer vacation
summary: CNBC Select highlights overlooked credit card benefits that consumers can leverage to reduce vacation expenses. Many cardholders underutilize travel rewards and perks included in their plans. The feature encourages travelers to maximize existing credit card benefits for summer trips.
content: CNBC Select goes over some of the most overlooked credit card benefits that could help you save money on your summer travels.

zh.title: 你的信用卡可以帮你降低夏季度假的成本
zh.summary: CNBC Select 强调了被忽视的信用卡优势,消费者可以利用这些优势来降低度假开支。许多持卡人没有充分利用其计划中的旅行奖励和福利。该特色鼓励旅行者最大化现有信用卡的优势,用于夏季旅行。

title: Putting your baby to work as a model could net them $5.7 million by age 60. Here’s the legit way to do it.
summary: A content creator proposes using baby modeling earnings as part of an 18-year savings strategy potentially generating $5.7 million by age 60. Financial professionals have validated the approach as viable for certain families with proper tax planning. The strategy combines legitimate income generation with disciplined long-term wealth building.
content: One content creator says this 18-year savings plan will make her baby extremely wealthy. CPAs think it’s a great idea for certain families.

zh.title: 让你的宝宝做模特可能在60岁前为他们赚取570万美元。这是合法的做法。
zh.summary: 一位内容创作者建议将婴儿模特收入用作18年储蓄策略的一部分,可能在60岁前产生570万美元。财务专业人士已验证该方法对具有适当税务规划的某些家庭是可行的。该策略将合法收入与有纪律的长期财富构建相结合。

title: Trump to host Cabinet meeting at Camp David on Wednesday as Iran talks continue
summary: President Trump is convening a Cabinet meeting at Camp David to discuss foreign and domestic issues, marking a rare gathering at the Maryland retreat. The meeting occurs amid ongoing diplomatic discussions regarding Iran. The setting underscores the significance of the agenda items being addressed.
content: Trump and his top officials will make the rare trip to the woodsy Maryland retreat to discuss issues both foreign and domestic, a White House official said.

zh.title: 特朗普将于周三在戴维营主持内阁会议,伊朗谈判继续进行
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在戴维营召集内阁会议,讨论外交和国内问题,这是该马里兰度假胜地的一次罕见聚集。会议在进行中的伊朗外交讨论中进行。该场景强调了所讨论议程项目的重要性。

title: My friend, 62, earns $20,000 a year. Should she take Social Security now — and claim survivor’s benefit at 67?
summary: A financial advisor analyzes Social Security claiming strategies for a low-income 62-year-old, calculating break-even analysis at around age 78. The column illustrates how claiming age impacts lifetime benefits and survivor benefits. The guidance addresses specific circumstances for individuals making early retirement decisions.
content: “I calculated her break-even point to be around age 78.”

zh.title: 我的朋友62岁，年收入2万美元。她现在应该申领社会保障金吗——并在67岁时申领遗属福利？
zh.summary: 一位财务顾问为一位年入2万美元的低收入62岁人士分析了社会保障金申领策略，计算出在大约78岁时达到收支平衡。该专栏说明了申领年龄如何影响终身福利和遗属福利。该指导针对做出提前退休决定的个人的具体情况。

title: Jay Woods is watching two beaten-down software stocks into earnings this week
summary: Investment analyst Jay Woods highlights two underperforming software stocks reporting earnings this week with potential turnaround opportunities. The analysis also examines how a new inflation report could influence Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh's policy decisions. The focus reflects investor attention to software sector valuations and monetary policy implications.
content: Jay Woods reviews two key software stocks reporting earnings this week, as well as what a new inflation report could mean for new Fed chair Kevin Warsh.

zh.title: Jay Woods关注本周财报的两只被打压的软件股票
zh.summary: 投资分析师Jay Woods强调了本周公布财报的两只表现不佳的软件股票，这些股票有潜在的扭转机会。该分析还研究了新的通胀报告可能如何影响美联储主席凯文·沃什的政策决定。这一关注反映了投资者对软件部门估值和货币政策影响的重视。

title: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston to step down after 19 years at helm of cloud storage pioneer
summary: Drew Houston, who founded Dropbox at age 24 and led the cloud storage pioneer for 19 years, is stepping down as CEO to become executive chairman. The leadership transition marks a significant milestone for the company. Houston's shift to chairman suggests continued involvement in strategy while new leadership assumes operational control.
content: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston, who started the cloud storage company when he was 24, plans to step down and assume the role of executive chairman.

zh.title: Dropbox首席执行官Drew Houston在执掌云存储先驱19年后宣布下台
zh.summary: 24岁时创办Dropbox并领导这家云存储先驱企业19年的Drew Houston正在从首席执行官职位下台，转而担任执行主席。这一领导层转变标志着公司的一个重要里程碑。Houston转向主席一职表明他将继续参与战略，而新的领导层将接管运营控制。

title: BP chairman removed over 'serious' conduct concerns
summary: BP's board has removed Chairman Albert Manifold due to serious conduct concerns, with senior independent director Amanda Blanc stating the board was "surprised and disappointed" by the issues. This marks a significant leadership change at the major energy company. The decision reflects serious governance matters at the British petroleum major.
content: Senior independent director Amanda Blanc says the board has been "surprised and disappointed" to learn of the issues.

zh.title: BP主席因'严重'品行问题被免职
zh.summary: BP董事会因严重品行问题撤销了主席艾伯特·曼尼福尔德的职位,独立董事阿曼达·布兰克表示董事会对这些问题感到"惊讶和失望"。这标志着这家主要能源公司的重大领导层变更。该决定反映了英国石油巨头的严重治理问题。

title: BP shares fall after board removes chairman Albert Manifold over 'serious’ conduct concerns
summary: BP's board unanimously voted to remove Chairman Albert Manifold immediately over serious conduct concerns, prompting a decline in the company's stock price. The swift action underscores the severity of the governance issues identified. This represents a major leadership upheaval at the British energy giant.
content: The board of British energy major BP on Tuesday announced it had unanimously decided to remove Chairman Albert Manifold with immediate effect.

zh.title: BP董事长因'严重'品行问题被撤销后股价下跌
zh.summary: BP董事会一致投票立即撤销董事长艾伯特·曼尼福尔德因严重品行问题,导致公司股价下跌。这一迅速行动强调了所发现治理问题的严重性。这代表了英国能源巨头的重大领导层变动。

title: Dow futures rise 200 points on tentative hope U.S.-Iran deal is close: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures rose 200 points amid tentative optimism about a potential U.S.-Iran deal. The S&P 500 climbed 0.9% last week to achieve its longest winning streak since late 2023. Market sentiment shows cautious positivity on possible geopolitical resolution.
content: The S&P 500 climbed 0.9% last week to notch its longest weekly winning streak since late 2023.

zh.title: 道指期货因对美伊协议接近达成抱有初步希望而上涨200点:实时更新
zh.summary: 在对潜在美伊协议抱有初步乐观态度的背景下,美国股指期货上涨200点。标普500指数上周上涨0.9%,创下自2023年末以来最长连胜记录。市场情绪对可能的地缘政治解决方案表现出谨慎乐观。

title: Investors ‘afraid’ to take position on oil, data chiefs say as tankers face potential Hormuz fees
summary: Oil markets are showing investor hesitation as Iran may impose transit fees on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz as part of a U.S. peace deal. The uncertainty over potential charges is keeping traders cautious about taking positions in energy. The concerns reflect broader anxieties about how negotiations could affect global oil trade.
content: Oil markets fear Iran may impose fees on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz as part of any peace deal with the U.S.

zh.title: 投资者对石油"感到害怕"，数据负责人称油轮面临霍尔木兹海峡潜在费用
zh.summary: 石油市场显示投资者犹豫不决，因为伊朗可能对经过霍尔木兹海峡的船只征收过路费，作为美国和平协议的一部分。潜在费用的不确定性使交易员对建立能源头寸持谨慎态度。这些担忧反映了对谈判如何影响全球石油贸易的更广泛焦虑。

title: We're again trimming a stock up 46% last week and 80% since our April initiation
summary: An investment analyst is trimming a position in a stock that has gained 46% in the past week and 80% since April. The strategy reflects a principle of taking profits on parabolic moves rather than pursuing momentum. This demonstrates disciplined portfolio management amid volatile markets.
content: More broadly, we don't buy parabolic moves; we take profits.

zh.title: 我们再次减持一只股票，该股上周上涨46%，自4月启动以来上涨80%
zh.summary: 一位投资分析师正在减持一只股票的头寸，该股在过去一周上涨了46%，自4月以来上涨了80%。这一策略反映了在抛物线走势中获利了结而非追逐动量的原则。这展示了在波动市场中的纪律性投资组合管理。

title: Eli Lilly stock edges higher as company plans nearly $4 billion in vaccine deals
summary: Eli Lilly announced plans for nearly $4 billion in vaccine deals to expand its infectious disease research and development capabilities. The stock edged higher on the news of the strategic expansion. The move positions the pharmaceutical company to diversify its portfolio and grow in new therapeutic areas.
content: The deals are part of Eli Lilly’s effort to expand into infectious disease research and development.

zh.title: 礼来股票小幅上升，公司计划进行近40亿美元的疫苗交易
zh.summary: 礼来公司宣布计划进行近40亿美元的疫苗交易，以扩展其传染病研发能力。在战略扩展的消息发布后，该股小幅上升。此举定位这家制药公司以多样化其投资组合并在新的治疗领域实现增长。

title: Global oil prices climb back toward $100 a barrel after U.S. launches new strikes in southern Iran despite potential deal
summary: Global oil prices are climbing back toward $100 per barrel following new U.S. military strikes in southern Iran, despite ongoing peace negotiations. The escalating military action contradicts hopes for diplomatic resolution. The geopolitical tensions are creating significant uncertainty in energy markets.
content: Global oil prices were creeping back toward the $100 a barrel mark on Tuesday.

zh.title: 美国向伊朗南部发起新军事打击后全球油价回升至近100美元/桶，尽管存在潜在协议
zh.summary: 美国向伊朗南部发动新军事打击后，全球油价正回升至每桶100美元附近，尽管和平谈判仍在进行中。不断升级的军事行动与外交解决的希望相悖。地缘政治紧张局势正在能源市场造成重大不确定性。

title: Ferry frustrations and housing concerns in Gorey
summary: Business owners in Gorey, including café operators, are facing increased costs due to new freight pricing on ferry services. The pricing changes are creating frustration among local merchants trying to maintain operations. Housing affordability concerns are also emerging in the community.
content: Café owners and others in Gorey tell the BBC a new freight pricing model is driving up costs.

zh.title: Gorey地区的渡轮服务困扰和住房问题
zh.summary: Gorey的企业主（包括咖啡馆经营者）由于渡轮服务新运费定价而面临成本增加。定价变化引发了当地商人的不满，他们努力维持业务运营。社区中住房可负担性问题也浮出水面。

title: UK gilt yields retreat from multi-decade highs as political drama mellows, rate hike expectations ease
summary: UK gilt yields have retreated from multi-decade highs as political uncertainty eases and rate hike expectations moderate. The 10-year gilt yield fell to 4.85% as bond markets resumed trading after a bank holiday. Easing political tensions are supporting a decline in expected borrowing costs.
content: As bond markets returned from a bank holiday on Tuesday morning, the yield on the benchmark 10-year bond stood at 4.85%.

zh.title: 随着政治局势平静、加息预期缓和，英国吉利债收益率从数十年高位回落
zh.summary: 随着政治不确定性缓解和加息预期温和，英国吉利债收益率从数十年高位回落。在银行假期后债券市场恢复交易期间，10年期吉利债收益率下降至4.85%。政治紧张局势缓解正在支撑预期借款成本的下降。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Micron, Pershing Square, Dell, Occidental & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on major stocks including Nvidia, Apple, Micron, and Occidental on Tuesday. These analyst recommendations signal shifts in conviction on key technology and energy stocks. The calls provide market guidance as investors navigate ongoing volatility.
content: Here are Tuesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周二最大的分析师评级：英伟达、苹果、美光、Pershing Square、戴尔、Occidental等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周二对英伟达、苹果、美光和Occidental等主要股票发表了重要评级。这些分析师建议反映了对关键科技和能源股票看法的转变。这些评级为投资者应对持续波动提供了市场指引。

title: Bill Ackman's stock is off to a great start since its debut. But analysts are leery from here
summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square stock (PS) and its affiliated closed-end fund (PSUS) have had a strong debut on the New York Stock Exchange. However, analysts remain cautious about future performance following the early momentum. The skepticism suggests concerns about valuation sustainability post-launch.
content: The stock, which trades under the ticker PS, debuted alongside closed-end fund Pershing Square USA, or PSUS, on the New York Stock Exchange.

zh.title: 比尔·阿克曼的股票上市以来开局良好。但分析师对后续持谨慎态度
zh.summary: 比尔·阿克曼的Pershing Square股票（PS）及其关联的封闭式基金（PSUS）在纽约证交所上市表现强劲。然而在初期涨势之后，分析师对未来表现仍持谨慎态度。这种怀疑反映了对上市后估值可持续性的担忧。

title: BP ousts another top executive over claims brought to the board
summary: BP's board unanimously removed Chairman Albert Manifold and a company director with immediate effect over serious claims brought to the board. This major leadership overhaul indicates significant governance concerns at the energy company. The swift dual removal reflects the severity of the issues identified.
content: BP said its board unanimously decided to remove Albert Manifold as chair, as well as a director, with immediate effect.

zh.title: BP因董事会收到的指控罢免高管
zh.summary: BP董事会因收到的严重指控，以全票一致决议立即罢免了董事长Albert Manifold和一名公司董事。这次重大的领导层变更表明该能源公司存在重大治理问题。这两项迅速的罢免决定反映了所发现问题的严重性。

title: Wells Fargo to offer mortgage incentives on 3D printed homes with Icon
summary: Wells Fargo is offering mortgage incentives on Icon's 3D-printed homes, providing a 50 basis point lender credit to qualifying borrowers. The partnership reflects growing interest in innovative construction technologies for residential real estate. This initiative positions both companies at the forefront of housing innovation.
content: Wells Fargo will provide a 50 basis point lender credit to buyers of Icon homes using its mortgages.

zh.title: 富国银行为Icon 3D打印房屋提供抵押贷款激励措施
zh.summary: 富国银行为Icon的3D打印房屋提供抵押贷款激励措施,为符合条件的借款人提供50个基点的贷款人信用额度。该合作反映了人们对住宅房地产创新建筑技术日益增长的兴趣。这一举措使两家公司处于住房创新的最前沿。

title: This bear market signal Wall Street ignores is putting your money at risk right now
summary: Veteran trader Steve Burns warns of a bear market signal that Wall Street is overlooking, which he argues poses significant risk to investor portfolios. He identifies three "deadly stock-market sins" destroying returns and warns of potential 50% declines. The analysis suggests current market conditions may be more fragile than consensus expectations.
content: Veteran trader Steve Burns prepares for a 50% decline and exposes the 3 “deadly stock-market sins” destroying portfolios.

zh.title: 华尔街忽视的熊市信号正在威胁你的资金安全
zh.summary: 资深交易员Steve Burns警告华尔街正在忽视的熊市信号,他认为这对投资组合构成重大风险。他指出了三种"致命的股市罪恶"正在摧毁收益,并警告可能出现50%的跌幅。该分析表明当前市场条件可能比市场共识预期更加脆弱。

title: Here’s the defensive stock-market trade that works no matter where bond yields end up
summary: JPMorgan identifies low-volatility stocks as an effective defensive trade that performs well regardless of bond yield direction. These stocks have underperformed year-to-date but appear positioned for a breakout. The strategy offers portfolio protection across various macroeconomic scenarios.
content: JPMorgan says low-volatility stocks have underperformed this year, are ready to bust out no matter what the macro backdrop looks like.

zh.title: 无论债券收益率走向如何,这种防守性股票交易策略都能奏效
zh.summary: 摩根大通指出低波动性股票是一种有效的防守性交易,无论债券收益率方向如何,都能表现良好。这些股票今年迄今为止表现不佳,但似乎已准备好突破。该策略在各种宏观经济情景下都能提供投资组合保护。

title: European stocks open mixed following U.S. strikes on Iran, mixed messages on peace talks
summary: European stocks opened mixed Tuesday as traders monitored Middle East and Ukraine developments. The uncertainty around U.S.-Iran tensions and conflicting peace signals created volatility in market sentiment.
content: European stocks opened mixed on Tuesday, as traders watched developments in the Middle East and Ukraine.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗的打击后欧洲股市开盘走混，和平谈判信号混合
zh.summary: 欧洲股市周二开盘走混，交易员监测中东和乌克兰局势发展。美国-伊朗紧张局势的不确定性和相互矛盾的和平信号造成了市场情绪的波动。

title: EU plans to fine Google high triple-digit million euro sum, Handelsblatt reports
summary: The EU is planning to impose a massive fine on Google for violating its Digital Markets Act, marking the largest penalty under the legislation designed to rein in big tech's market dominance.
content: The fine would be the largest penalty the EU has imposed for a breach of its Digital Markets Act, which aims to curb the power of big tech companies.

zh.title: 据《商报》报道，欧盟计划对谷歌处以高达三位数百万欧元的罚款
zh.summary: 欧盟计划因谷歌违反《数字市场法》而对其处以巨额罚款，这是该旨在遏制大科技公司市场主导地位的法律下的最大罚款。

title: Ferrari's electric ambitions with the Luce launch
summary: Ferrari unveiled its first fully electric vehicle, the Luce, co-designed with former Apple designer Jony Ive, featuring dual electric motors and 0-100 km/h acceleration in 2.5 seconds. The five-seater marks Ferrari's entry into the electric car market.
content: Ferrari has unveiled its first fully electric car, co-designed by former Apple chief designer Jony Ive. The 'Ferrari Luce' is a five-seater, powered by an electric engine on each wheel - and is able to reach 100 kilometres per hour in just 2-and-a-half seconds. CNBC's Charlotte Reed speaks to the CEO, Benedetto Vigna.

zh.title: 法拉利通过Luce电动车推出展现其电动雄心
zh.summary: 法拉利推出其首款完全电动车型Luce，由前苹果设计师乔尼·艾夫联合设计，配备双电动马达，0-100公里/小时加速时间为2.5秒。这款五座车型标志着法拉利进入电动汽车市场。

title: 'An £8,000 debt pushed me to breaking point'
summary: A Bradford resident shares his struggle with significant personal debt, urging others to seek help when facing financial hardship. His story highlights the psychological toll of debt and the importance of support resources.
content: A Bradford man who has struggled with debt urges others to reach out for help.

zh.title: "一笔8000英镑的债务把我逼到了崩溃的边缘"
zh.summary: 一位布拉德福德居民分享了他与巨额个人债务的斗争，敦促其他人在面临经济困难时寻求帮助。他的故事突出了债务的心理代价和支持资源的重要性。

title: Bank holiday sun boosts South West tourism
summary: Sunny weather during a bank holiday drove a tourism surge in Devon and Cornwall, with business owners crediting favorable conditions for increased customer traffic. The bright conditions demonstrated weather's significant impact on tourism-dependent regional economies.
content: Business owners in Devon and Cornwall describe how "the sun just brings everybody out".

zh.title: 银行假日阳光促进西南地区旅游业
zh.summary: 银行假日期间的晴朗天气促进了德文郡和康沃尔郡的旅游热潮，商业主人将客流增加归功于有利的天气条件。明媚的天气表明了天气对旅游业依赖型地区经济的重大影响。

title: U.S. conducts 'self-defense strikes' in Iran as Trump pushes for peace deal
summary: The U.S. carried out targeted strikes on Iranian military sites including missile facilities and boats attempting to lay mines, even as the Trump administration pursues diplomatic peace negotiations. The military action and diplomatic efforts represent a complex balancing act in U.S.-Iran relations.
content: Targets included missile launch sites and Iranian boats attempting to emplace mines.

zh.title: 特朗普推进和平协议之际，美国在伊朗实施"自卫打击"
zh.summary: 美国对包括导弹设施和试图布设水雷的船只在内的伊朗军事目标进行了精准打击，而特朗普政府同时在进行外交和平谈判。军事行动和外交努力在美伊关系中体现了一种复杂的平衡行为。

title: Ferrari unveils first fully electric car
summary: Ferrari launched its first fully electric vehicle, the Luce model, despite pressure from Chinese EV competitors, though the design generated mixed social media reactions. The move signals traditional luxury automakers adapting to the electric vehicle transition.
content: The new Luce model has divided opinion on social media, and comes despite intense pressure from Chinese EV makers.

zh.title: 法拉利推出首款全电动汽车
zh.summary: 尽管面临中国电动汽车竞争对手的压力，法拉利推出了其首款全电动汽车Luce车型，但该设计在社交媒体上引发了不同的反应。这一举动标志着传统豪华汽车制造商正在适应电动汽车转型。

title: Oil prices mixed as U.S. military strikes against Iran cloud Middle East peace prospects
summary: U.S. military strikes against Iran are creating uncertainty in Middle East peace negotiations and affecting oil prices. The Trump administration says negotiations are proceeding well but warned that military action could resume if talks collapse.
content: Donald Trump also said negotiations with Iran were "proceeding nicely," but cautioned that the U.S. could resume military action if discussions were to collapse.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗军事打击致油价波动，中东和平前景蒙阴
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗的军事打击在中东和平谈判中造成不确定性，影响油价。特朗普政府表示谈判进展顺利，但警告如果谈判破裂，可能恢复军事行动。

title: South Korea's Kospi hits fresh record as hopes of U.S.-Iran breakthrough rise
summary: South Korea's Kospi stock index reached a fresh record as optimism grows around U.S.-Iran peace negotiations. Asia-Pacific markets are broadly higher, driven by investor confidence in a potential diplomatic breakthrough.
content: Asia-Pacific markets were set to open broadly higher Tuesday, amid hopes for a breakthrough in the U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.

zh.title: 美伊突破希望上升，韩国科斯皮指数创下新高
zh.summary: 随着美伊和平谈判乐观情绪增长，韩国科斯皮股票指数创下新高。亚太地区市场普遍上涨，由投资者对潜在外交突破的信心推动。
